summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 Feature: PredictionHistory component in Market Oracle AI MVP. All core functionality verified working correctly including localStorage persistence, UI interactions, and layout integration.
passed_tests: PredictionHistory component renders in correct position below TickerStrip
Empty state displays correctly with proper messaging
localStorage persistence works across page refreshes
History entries display with all required fields (ticker, direction, confidence %, event summary, timestamp)
Collapse/expand toggle works (shows 3 by default, expands to show all)
Clear history button works with confirmation dialog
Component does not break existing layout or ASX heatmap functionality
Data-testid attributes present for automated testing
